mdRecord.dcterms:title: Map of the Battle Fields of ""The Wilderness"" or Chancellorsville, Salem Church and Fredericksburg, Spotsylvania County Virginia. Showing The Attacks and Positions of the Army of Northern Virginia C.S. Commanded by Gen.R.E.Lee; and of the Army of the Potomac United States commanded by Maj.Gen.Jos.Hooker. Saturday, May 2nd 1863 From Actual Surveys made immediately after the Battles, by Order of Gen.R.E.Lee Jed.Hotchkiss
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Map of Map of the Battle Fields of "The Wilderness" or Chancellorsville, Salem Church and Fredericksburg, Spotsylvania County Virginia. Showing The Attacks and Positions of the Army of Northern Virginia C.S. Commanded by Gen.R.E.Lee; and of the Army of the Potomac United States commanded by Maj.Gen.Jos.Hooker. Saturday, May 2nd 1863 From Actual Surveys made immediately after the Battles, by Order of Gen.R.E.Lee Jed.Hotchkiss
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
